Event: Cornucopia Island May 2025
Event Date: 19/05/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A222
Mushroom Concoction

Triggers: 4 sec

Life-Saving Tornado
The unit is surrounded by a vortex for 5 sec.The artifact owner and all allied units in a small radius around them take 50% less damage for 5 sec. 3 nearby enemy units take 175000 damage every second for 5 sec. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. The affected enemies also have their physical and magic armor reduced by 25% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.
Enemy units have a 50% chance to be stunned for 1 sec when taking damage from the vortex.

Requirements: 90-100
